untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies 'Bearish breakaway candlestick formation identified' as entry condition, which is a visual pattern recognition rule that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The exact composition of a bearish breakaway pattern (gap presence, multiple candle bodies, specific wick formations) requires pattern-specific logic not available in the indicator list. Approximated with body contraction and price below 50-day MA as proxy, but this does not capture the true pattern definition.
translation_notes: Entry condition approximated using: bearish candle body smaller than previous body (reversal signal) AND price below sma_50 (breakout direction DOWN confirmed). Exit when price crosses back above sma_50 (reversal of short thesis). Success rates (89% in bear market) suggest tight stops around 5%. Pattern is rare (98th of 103), frequency_ranking noted but not used in rules. Opening gap confirmation mentioned in source text but not directly expressible; volume_trend and throwback parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT so not included.
